settings.text:
FAQ for £6 Raffle

Q1: What is the £6 Raffle?
A1: The £6 Raffle is a fun and exciting opportunity to win clothing items and even a chance to be included in our next photo shoot! There are a total of 6 winners—3 boys and 3 girls.

Q2: What can I win in the raffle?
A2: Participants can win various clothing items. Additionally, if you're in the same country as our next photo shoot, you might even get the chance to be included!

Q3: How do I find out what items are available to win?
A3: Before purchasing your £6 raffle ticket, you'll have the option to view the possible items that can be won.

Q4: How will the winners be chosen?
A4: Winners will be randomly selected from all participants. There will be 6 winners in total: 3 boys and 3 girls.

Q5: How will the items be sent to the winners?
A5: The items will be sent out at random, ensuring a surprise for all winners!

Q6: Do I need to be in a specific location to enter?
A6: No, you can enter the raffle from anywhere! However, if you win the chance to be included in the next photo shoot, you must be in the same country as the shoot location.

Q7: How do I enter the raffle?
A7: Simply purchase a £6 raffle ticket. Once your purchase is confirmed, you'll be entered into the draw!

Q8: When will the winners be announced?
A8: Winners will be announced shortly after the raffle closes. Keep an eye on our announcements for updates!

Q9: Can I enter more than once?
A9: Yes, you can purchase multiple tickets to increase your chances of winning!

Q10: Can I share the raffle with friends and family?
A10: Absolutely! Sharing the raffle with your friends and family not only helps spread the word but also increases your chances of knowing someone who could win. The more people who enter, the more exciting the raffle becomes!

Q11: Is there a reward for sharing the raffle?
A11: Yes! We will hold a mini raffle for our top supporters who share the raffle the most. There will be 3 winners, each receiving a special prize!

Q12: How do I register who I shared the raffle with?
A12: When you purchase your raffle ticket, please add your name, email, and social media handle, along with a reference to the person who shared the raffle with you (either their social media or email). This will help us track shares for the mini raffle.

Q13: What if I have more questions?
A13: Feel free to reach out to our customer support team for any additional questions or clarifications.

Good luck, and thank you for participating in the £6 Raffle!
